ham-and-cheese-hand-pies-with-honey-must.name: Ham And Cheese Hand Pies With Honey Mustard
instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 375°. Stir mustard and honey in a medium bowl to combine. Beat egg, a pinch of salt, and 1 Tbsp. water in another small bowl to combine; set egg wash aside.

Unfold puff pastry on a lightly floured surface. If using a 17.3-oz. package with 2 sheets, arrange them next to each other so they overlap slightly on a long side and gently press together to make 1 large sheet. Roll pastry to a 20x15" rectangle, then slice into 5" squares with a sharp knife (4 squares on long sides and 3 squares on short sides for 12 total).

Spread about 1 tsp. honey mustard on the bottom half of each square to make a right triangle, leaving about ½" border along edges. Divide cheese and ham among squares, arranging on top of honey mustard. Using a pastry brush or your finger, brush or swipe reserved egg wash around edges of each square. Working with 1 square at a time, fold corner without any honey mustard up and over filling to meet opposite bottom corner, making a triangle. Press edges together to seal. Using a fork, crimp edges. Divide hand pies among 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing evenly. Brush tops with egg wash; sprinkle with pepper and sesame seeds. Chill in freezer 30 minutes.

Cut a few slits in the top of each hand pie to let steam escape while baking. Bake hand pies, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back halfway through, until golden brown and puffed, 30–35 minutes. Let cool slightly.
Serve hand pies with remaining honey mustard on the side for dipping.

ham-potato-and-cabbage-stew.name: Ham, Potato, And Cabbage Stew
instructions: Melt butter in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Add onion and cook until it begins to turn clear, 2 to 5 minutes. Stir in carrots and garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.

Stir in cabbage, ham, and potatoes, then add stock, pepper, mustard, and salt. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until cabbage is tender and potatoes are cooked, about 20 minutes.

hanger-steak-with-tangy-tomato-relish.name: Hanger Steak With Tangy Tomato Relish

ingredients.prep: center membrane removed, or flank steak

ingredients.item: Fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper
Fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Season the hanger steak with fine sea salt and pepper. Let steak sit at room temperature for at least 20 minutes before cooking.

Heat the oil in a heavy 9-or 10-inch skillet over high heat. Working in batches if necessary, add the steak to the pan and cook, turning once, until browned on both sides and an instant-read thermometer registers 130˚F for medium-rare, 7 to 8 minutes total.
Let the steak rest at least 10 minutes, then slice it on a diagonal. Season with flaky sea salt, if desired, and serve with parsley leaves and tomato relish.
Preheat the oven to 425˚F.

Toss the tomatoes with 1 tablespoon of the olive oil and spread them in a single layer in a baking dish. Season with salt and black pepper to taste and roast until the tomatoes are crinkled and browned and any liquid in the pan is reduced, 18 to 20 minutes. Let cool.

In a wide nonreactive saucepan, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon oil over medium- high heat. Add the mustard seeds and cook until they pop, about 30 seconds. Add the onion, garlic, red pepper flakes, ginger, and a pinch of salt. Cook, stirring frequently, until the onion has softened, about 3 minutes. Add the roasted tomatoes and stir to combine, but take care to keep the tomatoes intact. Add the orange juice and Worcestershire sauce. Cook, stirring gently, until the juices have thickened to a jammy consistency, about 5 minutes. Taste and season with salt and black pepper.

harvard-beets.name: Harvard Beets
instructions: Combine sugar, cornstarch, vinegar, and water in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, and cook for 5 minutes.
Add beets to the liquid, and simmer for 30 minutes over low heat. Stir in butter, salt, and pepper, and remove from the heat. Serve warm or chilled.

hawaiian-bbq-pulled-jackfruit-pizza.name: Hawaiian Bbq Pulled Jackfruit Pizza
instructions: Start by making the pizza dough. Add the sugar to your warm water and stir to dissolve. Next add the yeast, stir to combine and leave to activate for 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, add the strong white bread flour and salt to a large bowl and stir to combine. Once your yeast is bubbly and alive add to your dry ingredients along with your olive oil.
Bring together into a dough and turn out onto a floured work surface. Knead for 10-15 minutes or until nice and elastic.
Lightly grease a large bowl and place your kneaded dough in the bowl. Cover and leave to prove for 1 hour or until doubled in size.

Whilst you are waiting for that lovely dough to rise, get on with your BBQ sauce. Place a saucepan over a medium heat and add the oil, red onion and garlic. Cook for 5-6 minutes stirring occasionally.
Next add the 2 tsp smoked paprika, ½ tsp cayenne pepper, ½ tsp ground ginger, ½ tsp ground cinnamon, 1 tsp salt. Stir and toast the spices for 1-2 minutes.
Add the ketchup, rice vinegar, light brown sugar, Knorr Vegatable Stock Pot and 300ml of hot water. Stir, bring to a simmer and cook for 20 minutes. Once cooked, puree in a blender. Set aside.
Preheat the oven to 190C.

Place your jackfruit, red onion, green pepper on a baking tray along with 6 tbsp of your BBQ sauce. Stir until your veggies are nicely coated with your BBQ sauce. Roast in the oven for 25 minutes. Once starting to char and nicely roasted pull the jackfruit, give everything a good stir and place into a bowl.
When you are ready to cook your pizzas turn your oven up as high as it will go!  Next simply remove your dough from the bowl, stretch into a rough sausage shape and divide the dough into four.

Stretch the dough out thin into a pizza shape and top with passata, your jackfruit mix, pineapple chunks and lashings of cheese. Place onto a baking tray and bake for 8-10 minutes or until the bottom is crispy, the cheese is bubbling and the crust is charring.
Once cooked top an extra drizzle of BBQ sauce, dried oregano and rocket. Serve & enjoy!

hawaiian-ginger-ale.name: Hawaiian Ginger Ale
instructions: Bring ginger, sugar, and 2 cups water to a boil in a small saucepan. Remove from heat, cover, and let sit 30 minutes. Strain syrup through a fine-mesh sieve into a bowl or jar and discard ginger. Let cool completely. (You should have about 2 cups.)
For each drink, add 1/4 cup ginger syrup and 1/2 cup club soda to an Old Fashioned glass filled with ice; stir to combine. Garnish with a lime wedge.
DO AHEAD: Ginger syrup can be made 1 month ahead. Cover and chill.

herbed-chicken-salad-over-crispy-rice.name: Herbed Chicken Salad Over Crispy Rice

ingredients.prep: pale-green and white parts only, thinly sliced

instructions: Real Talk: Okay, fine: Rinsing the rice sounds pretty fussy, but it has an actual purpose. The water will remove the surface starch on the rice, which will make it easier to get it to brown and separate into individual grains, instead of going gummy and sticky on you. So now you know everything. If you skip this step, the fried rice police won’t come after you, but we still think it’s worth it.

Rinse rice under cold water, stirring vigorously, then drain. Repeat process until water runs clear, 4–5 times. Cook rice in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally so rice doesn’t stick to bottom, until grains are slightly chalky in the center (rice will be undercooked—this is intentional), about 5 minutes. Drain and transfer to a large bowl.

Meanwhile, heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium skillet (preferably cast iron or nonstick) over medium. Cook carrot and leek, stirring occasionally, until tender, 6–8 minutes; season with salt. Add to bowl with rice and stir to combine; season with 2 tsp. salt.

Spread a clean kitchen towel on a work surface. Place a lid for a medium skillet in the center. Tie 4 corners of towel to handle on top of lid (you just made a special steam absorber that will keep the rice from becoming gummy; stay tuned).

Heat ¼ cup oil in same skillet over medium-high until very hot and shimmering, about 2 minutes; season with salt. Scrape rice mixture into pan, smoothing surface and gently pressing into pan to form a tight “rice cake.” Cover with towel-lined lid and cook, undisturbed, until rice on bottom of pan is browned and crisp (scrape a small area on bottom of pan to check), about 8 minutes. If rice hasn’t browned, continue to cook, covered, 2 more minutes. Remove from heat and let sit, covered, 15 minutes to steam.

Meanwhile, whisk garlic, lemon juice, mustard, and remaining 4 Tbsp. oil in a medium bowl. Add chicken and toss to coat; season with salt and pepper. Add cilantro and mint and toss gently just before serving.
Transfer rice to your fanciest platter. Arrange chicken salad over and serve.

herby-matzo-ball-soup.name: Herby Matzo Ball Soup

ingredients.prep: cut into 1–2-inch chunks on the bias
bottom trimmed, sliced into half moons

instructions: Make the soup: In a large, heavy-bottomed pan, arrange the chicken thighs and drumsticks skin-side down (depending on the size of the pan, you may need to work in batches). Turn the heat to medium-low and cook until the skin is golden brown and the fat has rendered, about 15 minutes. Flip the chicken pieces and cook until the fat has rendered from the other side, 7–10 minutes.
Transfer the chicken to a large stockpot and reserve the rendered fat. You’ll need 2 tablespoons, add canola oil as needed if there is not enough chicken fat.

Pour the cold water into the pot with the chicken and bring to a boil over high heat, skimming off any foam that rises to the surface. Reduce the heat to medium-low and add the onions, carrots, celery, fennel, salt, pepper, bay leaves, bunch of parsley, dill, and bouillon paste. Cover and gently simmer for 1½ hours. Using tongs, remove the chicken from the soup and pull the meat off the bones. Return the meat to the pot and discard any skin and bones. Cover the soup to keep warm.

While the soup simmers, make the matzo balls: In a medium bowl, whisk together the chicken fat and eggs until combined. Stir in the matzo ball mix with a rubber spatula. Refrigerate for 30–60 minutes.
Bring a large pot of salted water to boil.
Using wet hands, roll the matzo ball mix into 1-inch balls.
Add the matzo balls to the boiling water, cover, and cook for 20 minutes, or until cooked through. Transfer the matzo balls to the soup.
Just before serving, stir in the chopped parsley, chives, and lemon zest. Ladle into bowls and serve hot.
Enjoy!

high-altitude-birthday-cake.name: High-altitude Birthday Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line two 9-inch round cake pans with parchment paper. Grease and flour the bottoms and sides of the pans, making sure to remove excess flour.

Beat 1 ¾ cups plus 2 tablespoons sugar and butter together in a large bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Add eggs 1 at a time, beating well after each addition, until well incorporated.
Sift together flour, 1 tablespoon plus ¾ teaspoon baking powder, and salt in a separate bowl.
Mix milk, vanilla, and almond extract together in a third bowl.
Alternate adding flour mixture and milk mixture to butter mixture; blend well. Evenly distribute batter between the 2 prepared cake pans.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 25 to 30 minutes.
Remove cakes from the oven; let sit for 5 minutes. Let cool completely on wire racks before removing cakes from the pans.

honey-caramel-sauce-lezzet.name: Honey Caramel Sauce
instructions: 1. Take the sugar in a sauce pot.
2. Cook it with stirring up to be caramelized.
3. Add the cream and vanilla esan and quickly mix it from the stove.
4. Add honey and mix all material thoroughly paid again until you cook.
5. Serve Panna Cotta’ next to your service.

honey-oat-cookies.name: Honey Oat Cookies
instructions: Position a rack in the middle of the oven and preheat the oven to 177°C. Line a cookie sheet with parchment.
In a large bowl, whisk the oats, coconut, brown sugar, flour, baking soda, and cinnamon together thoroughly. Set aside.
In a small saucepan, combine the butter, honey, water, and vanilla and heat over medium-low heat, stirring, until the butter is melted and the mixture is thoroughly combined. Remove from the heat.
Make a well in the center of the flour mixture and pour in the butter mixture. Using a rubber spatula, fold the butter mixture thoroughly into the flour mixture and let sit for 5 minutes.

Use a small ice cream scoop to form the cookies, about 2 round tablespoons each, and place on the prepared cookie sheet, leaving 1 inch between them. With the palm of your hand, flatten each cookie into a 3-inch round, about ½ inch thick.
Bake the cookies for 10 to 12 minutes, rotating the pan halfway through the baking time, until they are a deep golden color. Let cool completely on a wire rack.

In a small pan, combine the chocolate chips, oil, and salt and heat over low heat, stirring constantly, until the chocolate is almost melted. Turn off the heat and stir until the chocolate is completely melted. Using a spoon, top each cookie with some of the topping. Let stand until the topping has set.
Do ahead: The cookies can be stored in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 5 days.

honey-of-an-oatmeal-bread.name: Honey Of An Oatmeal Bread
instructions: Place ingredients in bread machine pan in the order suggested by the manufacturer.
Select Light Crust or Basic setting, and press Start.

honey-ginger-turmeric-cough-drops.name: Honey-ginger-turmeric Cough Drops
instructions: Place a silicone candy mold (any shape) on a large baking sheet. Alternatively, if you don’t have molds, fill a shallow baking sheet with cornstarch. Set aside.

Stir together the honey, lemon juice, ginger, turmeric, and black pepper in a small, heavy-bottomed saucepan. Place a candy thermometer in the saucepan. Cook the mixture over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, until the mixture reaches 149°C (hard-crack stage), about 15 minutes. Watch closely to avoid scorching.

Immediately remove the pan from heat. Working quickly, spoon the hot mixture into the candy molds. Alternatively, if you’re not using molds, press the back of a tablespoon into the cornstarch in the baking sheet to create small wells. Spoon the hot mixture into each indentation to form drops. Let them set completely before dusting off any excess cornstarch.
Let the cough drops cool at room temperature until hardened, about 30 minutes.
Dust the hardened drops with the powdered sugar or cornstarch to prevent sticking. Store individually wrapped in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 months.
Enjoy!

hot-buttered-rum-in-a-slow-cooker.name: Hot Buttered Rum In A Slow Cooker
instructions: Combine water, rum, brown sugar, butter, cinnamon sticks, cloves, salt, and nutmeg in a slow cooker. Steep on Low until flavors combine, 2 to 6 hours.

how-to-cook-octopus-step-by-step-comeder.name: How To Cook Octopus Step By Step
how-to-cook-octopus-step-by-step-comeder.original_name: Cómo cocer pulpo paso a paso

When the pot water breaks to boiling, add two tablespoons of fat salt. Meg and then embody the laurel and glove leaves, if you have decided these ingredients.

Now's the time to dip his octopus. But wait, because to get started and still smooth up more, we have to "scare him." Then we have to wait just two or three seconds, get his octopus out and repeat three times more.

how-to-make-bean-enchiladas-comedera.name: How To Make Bean Enchiladas
how-to-make-bean-enchiladas-comedera.original_name: Cómo hacer hacer enchiladas de frijoles

Coloca en el centro la cebolla y tomate junto con un poco de queso rallado y cierra.
Serves freshly made enchiladas and likes with more bean sauce.

how-to-make-beef-carpaccio-traditional-i.name: How To Make Beef Carpaccio (traditional Italian Recipe)
how-to-make-beef-carpaccio-traditional-i.original_name: Cómo hacer carpaccio de ternera (receta tradicional italiana)

ingredients.item: 100 g padan gran cheese in cheeses (if you do not get them you can use parmesan)
100 ml de aceite de oliva virgen extra

We cut the meat very but very fine, as a sausage. To make it easier for you, you can put her half an hour in the freezer so she's firmer. how-to-make-broccoli-gratin-comedera.name: How To Make Broccoli Gratin

In milk we will dilute the flour till we have no clumps, and this mixture will be incorporated into the frying pan with its salted vegetables. We cook with low heat just till it becomes a cream.
In an oven-suitable bowl or refractory, we place the result of previous cooking with fresh and parmesan cheese.

how-to-make-chai-bun-maska-comedera.name: How To Make Chai Bun Maska
instructions: Tritura o machaca las vainas del cardamomo.
Hierve el agua y agrega el cardamomo machacado, la canela y el trocito de jengibre. Cocina por 4 minutos.
Incorporates black tea, mix and cook for another minute.
Gather the whole milk and sugar. Cooking at medium heat - low for 3 minutes or till weed again.
Apaga y cuela.
Abre el pan por la mitad pero no lo separes completamente.
Unite with butter and give it slightly or heat up for about 5 seconds in the microwave.
Serve hot tea by the bread. Enjoy!

how-to-make-chilean-sopaipilla-comedera.name: How To Make Chilean Sopaipilla

ingredients.item: 3 cdtas. of vegetable butter (margarine or melted butter)

Add the other ingredients and press to get a soft mass.
Let the dough rest for 20 minutes.
Stretch the double onto the pallet and leave it from the deserted myth. It can be half an inch.
Warm up oil at 180 ° C or 350ºF.
Fry about 3 minutes and about. They have to be well golden.
Put on a plate onto absorbing paper to get them to run.
Serves hot.

how-to-make-crystal-bread-comedera.name: How To Make Crystal Bread

ingredients.item: 3 gr  levadura liofilizada de panadero  ((9 g de levadura fresca))

instructions: Fermentation times are important, with an room temperature of about 20-21 ° C.
Mezclar en un bol grande o en el bol de una amasadora todos los ingredientes. Tapar y dejar reposar 10 minutos.

The dough as sticky should be amassed with folds rather than a classic amast. To make a fold, moist his hand, put it under the mass, between it and the wall of the bowl or bowl, put up a side of the mass, stretching with care, and turn it onto the rest of the mass. Do the same with the opposite side as if we double the mass into three as an envelope paper. We have to be delicate and tipsy and we have to try and stop them from breaking up.
Do folds every half an hour throughout 2 and a half hours, alternating the direction of the folds. We have to note how the mass gets sharpened, more elastic and more structured.

At this time you should have a lot of bubbles, as a sign that you are fermenting, you have to put it in the refrigerator and put them into the toilets to slow down the fermentation, rather than have them at room temperature.
After four to six cycles of bending-rest, rinse the table and turn the mass trying to avoid deflation. Also rinse above and rest 10 minutes.

At a table with plenty of flour, she starts stretching the dough with a lot of delicacy as a rectangle and starts from bottom and leaves it about 2 cm thick. If the dough resists stretching, let it rest 10 minutes and continue after.

We get our date bread out, we'll let it stand till it's cold and cut into thin cuts.
That's it!

how-to-make-egg-hash-brown-and-bacon-bur.name: How To Make Egg, Hash Brown, And Bacon Burrito
how-to-make-egg-hash-brown-and-bacon-bur.original_name: Cómo hacer burrito de huevo, hash brown y tocino

ingredients.item: 5  huevos grandes ((2 huevos por burrito, 1 para hash brown))
½ cup of shredded cheddar cheese

instructions: Inicia la receta y prepara el hash brown. En un recipiente agrega las papas ralladas, un huevo y las dos cucharadas de harina.
Una vez listas, salpimenta un poco al gusto.
Mezcla muy bien con una paletas hasta que se integren completamente. Reserva.
Ahora, en un recipiente mezcla los huevos con la leche, sal y pimienta al gusto.
Bate hasta mezclar muy bien.
Produce with the recipe and heat up a frying pan with sufficient oil after hot and then add a portion of the hash broken.
Now, cold for 8 minutes or till I have a dor from both sides. When ready, remove from the oil and leave to stand in a napkin to absorb the oil surplus.
Warm up another frying pan and melt the butter. Cooking scrambled eggs to taste.
To put up your burrito, warm your tortillas up good till they're golden.
Incorpora el hash brown en el centro de la tortilla.
It continues and incorporates the beaten egg, 2 strips of fried bacon, avocado and cheddar grated cheese.
Envuelve el burrito doblando los lados y enrolla muy bien.
Take care with your favorite sauce. Enjoy!

how-to-make-eggnog-flan-without-oven-com.name: How To Make Eggnog Flan Without Oven
how-to-make-eggnog-flan-without-oven-com.original_name: Cómo hacer flan de rompope sin horno

In a small pot, pour the sugar and heat up at medium heat till caramel. Cover the bottom and walls of the flan mold.
Fold the flan mixture into the mold with caramel and cover with aluminium, making sure to seal the banks well, so that air doesn't come out.
Fairy with a bath (make sure that the water doesn't get into the flan bin) onto the stove at medium heat, till the flan cuts about 1 hour.
To check that the flan is ready, order with a tipstick of wood, if clear, it's ready.
Remove from the fire, remove the flan bin from the water with care and let cold for 5-10 minutes. Unmold and enjoy.

how-to-make-farinata.name: How To Make Farinata

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Whisk together lukewarm water and garbanzo flour in a large bowl until smooth. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap or a plate and let stand at room temperature for 2 hours. Skim off as much foam as possible from the top of batter. Whisk 3 tablespoons olive oil, kosher salt, and rosemary into batter until well combined.
Preheat the oven to 260°C (260 degrees C).

Heat a 10-inch cast iron skillet over high heat until smoking hot. Pour remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil into the skillet and swirl to coat the bottom. Continue to heat until oil shimmers and a wisp of smoke rises from oil.
Quickly pour batter into hot oil; carefully transfer the skillet to the preheated oven.
Bake in the preheated oven until pancake is browned and crusty, 25 to 30 minutes. Transfer pancake immediately to a plate and cut into wedges. Garnish with freshly ground black pepper and serve hot.

how-to-make-mango-jelly-step-by-step-com.name: How To Make Mango Jelly Step By Step
how-to-make-mango-jelly-step-by-step-com.original_name: Cómo hacer jalea de mango paso a paso

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, lavando muy bien los mangos para quitarle todas las impurezas. Luego, incorpora la fruta en una olla grande con suficiente agua y ponla al fuego.
Cooking for about 30 minutes till smooth. You'll know that the mango will be at his point as soon as the shells open.
Once ready, turn off and remove from the pot and put to rest the mangoes to cool them.
When they are cold, remove the shell from the mangoes and with a spoon or fork you will remove all from the shell and seed from the fruit. He's trying to clear his whole pulp.
After you have all your pulp, you're gonna weigh and how much I give you is what you're gonna use with sugar. I mean, if you weigh 600 grams, you use 600 g of sugar.
Put his pulp into a pot and add sugar, a tablespoon of vanilla and lemon juice. Do a good mix and cook with medium heat and keep moving.
Jelly cooking could take an hour or 45 minutes. The important thing is that it's about medium heat and don't stop moving so that it doesn't stick.
You'll know that she's ready when she's jelly and as she moves her she's completely drawn from the bottom and walls of the pot.
Retira del fuego y vierte en un molde grande o individuales. Deja reposar hasta que entibie y luego lleva a la nevera para que compacte. No congeles, solo debe enfriarse.
Now, enjoy!

how-to-make-meatballs-in-sauce-comedera.name: How To Make Meatballs In Sauce

ingredients.item: 1 kg de carne picada (puedes usar cerdo o res... o ambas.)

instructions: Pon la carne picada en un recipiente grande donde puedas trabajar con ella sin dificultades.
Add about 2 tablespoons of well minced fresh parsley and mix.

Then put garlic powder, ground cumin, oregano, pepper and salt. The quantity? I put them in his eye. In the case of salt, if you're working with pork you can't prove it raw, so you have to use your instinct to the best and always think that's best if I miss his.

When you have all the built-in spices put a medium or small whole egg and some frosted bread into the flesh. Fold well. The idea is that you have a texture, let's say, a mass that you can work with your hands without problems, that you can shape them and that's not disarmament. To achieve this, perhaps you have to add frosted bread to the flesh, do it by and by, we don't want your bawks to have bread.
Once you have a texture that you can "kneel," make balls a little smaller than a peach. Don't worry if you don't get perfect round, don't care if they stick a little bit to your hands.

Acto seguido, vas a poner harina de trigo en un plato o una tabla y vas a pasar cada bola de carne por dicho plato hasta que queden bien cubiertas por todos lados procurando que no tengan una capa demasiado gruesa.
Take a look at that photo and have your padded meatballs.
Once they're all ready, heats up a big and profound frying pan, you can use a pot. Put a good jet of olive oil and fry an entire big onion minced into small cubes.
Once clear the onion get them out of the frying pan and save them.

Add a little more oil and place the meatballs. Put the fire down in half and let them cold. They move them constantly so they get golden all over them. Do it carefully so they won't get you broken up.
Reput the onion you had smoked before and add a can of 800g shredded tomato. Revolves well so that all the meatballs are well impregnated with salsa. Put the fire down and cover.
Deja cocinar por unos 45 minutos, recuerda, fuego bajo y siempre atento a que no se peguen. Remueve con una cuchara de palo de vez en cuanto.
After this time your salsa meatballs should be ready by now. Kill the fire and let them stand for a few minutes.

how-to-make-salmon-tartare-with-avocado-.name: How To Make Salmon Tartare With Avocado
how-to-make-salmon-tartare-with-avocado-.original_name: Cómo hacer tartar de salmón con aguacate

1 cucharadita de vinagre de arroz o de manzana

instructions: At first, we have to make sure that salmon's clear: with no skin and no thorns. The weight indicated corresponds to salmon meat and without these parts.

We'll also make sure that the pickles are well minced. If that's not the case, this is the perfect time to make this step and leave them ready to use them. We'll measure the spoonful with the chopped pickles. The same applies to onions, which should be well washed and finely minced.

The following will be to cut fish into cubes using a sharp knife. The idea is that with a single cut the fish will already be separated, with no need to go through with the knife, which can end up by crushing or deforming it.
We will also work avocado, we can cut them into pieces of the same size as fish.
We will leave salmon aside for a moment, to prepare a vinegar with the liquid ingredients: soya sauce, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, vinegar, an oil jet and mustard.
Then, in a bowl, we will mix salmon with this tidal and we will sew it with salt and pepper (the latter is completely optional).
Pasaremos el recipiente al refrigerador, para que la carne se impregne con este jugo. Es preferible colocar una tapa o cubierta, para que la marinada no se reseque.
We'll leave the salmon resting for about 20 minutes.
Once this time has passed, we will get salmon out of the refrigerator and mix with minced pickles, capers (preferably also minced but this remains at cook's best), avocado and onions.
Then we'll have a tipstick to check the date. If necessary, we'll get some salt and pepper.

instructions: We started this production by making our corn tortillas homemade. In a large bowl, mix corn flour and half a teaspoon of salt. It gradually adds tibia water, constantly intermingling to avoid clumps.
Fold the mixture up to a smooth and homogenous mass. Divide mass into small portions, and form balls the size of a nut.

Put a dough ball between two plastic sheets or waxed paper. Press the ball with a tortilla press or use a roller to get a desired thickness circle. Warm a paddle or frying pan with medium-high heat. Cooking each omelette for 30 seconds to 1 minute for each loin, until bubbles and dough appear slightly.

For salsa, put up a frying pan with olive oil. When hot, put the onion and garlic for about 3 minutes and then add the dry chilies, previously cut without the stem, tomato and cumin. Cooking for 20 minutes or till dry chilies are soft.
Add the chilies to a blender next to the chicken stock and mix. Reserve some salsa for later and another paddle with the pitted turkey.
Filling every omelette with a crumbling turkey and some cheese, then wrap them up. Put enchiladas in an oven fountain. Cover them with reserved chili sauce and sprinkle cheese onto them.
Hornea at 180 been 3 till the cheese melts and the enchiladas are hot. Serves with sour cream, purple onion and fresh cilantro.
